stemHtml: Which of the following statements correctly describes the human circulatory system?

options.a: Oxygenated blood is carried from the heart through the veins to the body tissue and through the arteries back to the heart.
options.b: The exchange of gases (metabolism of oxygen and carbon dioxide) primarily takes place in the arteries.
options.c: The exchange of gases (metabolism of oxygen and carbon dioxide) primarily takes place in the capillaries.
options.d: De-oxygenated blood is carried from the heart through the veins to the body tissue and through the arteries back to the heart.
